    x11-themes/qogir-gtk-themes: add new port

    Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK 3, GTK 2 and Gnome-Shell.

    Supported Desktop Environments:

    * Cinnamon
    * Gnome-Shell
    * Metacity
    * Plank
    * Unity
    * Xfce

    https://github.com/vinceliuice/Qogir-theme

    PR:             252774
    Reviewed by:    tcberner
